title: Inputs & Dropdowns
description: 32px height text inputs and dropdowns. Inputs: with-label group (forms) and without-label group (filters). Dropdowns: single-select and multiselect with border / borderless themes.

variantGroups.label: With label
variantGroups.description: Used in forms. A caption label sits above the input.

variants.label: With tooltip
variants.labelTooltip: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor.

variantGroups.label: Without label
variantGroups.description: Used in filters and compact contexts. No label above the field.

specialVariants.label: Textarea
specialVariants.description: Multi-line text. Fixed to 4 visible lines — scroll appears after.

specialVariants.label: Password
specialVariants.description: Characters hidden as dots. Eye icon toggles visibility.

specialVariants.label: Read only
specialVariants.description: Non-editable. Styled like placeholder text with a lock icon.

specialVariants.label: Search
specialVariants.description: Press Enter or click the icon to trigger search / filter.

specialVariants.label: Input with button
specialVariants.description: Pill button anchored inside the right edge. Use for inline actions (apply coupon, add tag, etc.).

pageUsage:
Renderer : renderers.inputs(data)
Source   : sections/components/inputs.json

Text input  → exact inline styles from renderVariant() in renderers.js inputs renderer
              height:32px · border-radius:6px · font:400 14px/20px · padding:0 10px

Dropdown    → dt-drop-wrap + dtDrop() / dtPickOpt()  (functions defined in index.html)
              Classes: .dt-drop-wrap  .dt-dtrigger  .dt-dlabel  .dt-dmenu
⚠️  Never use <select> — always use the dt-drop-wrap structure.
